---
title: Shadow ordering
---

Lede, so `0` and `text` resolve.

## Frontmatter

Slugs to `frontmatter`. Placed _before_ the `FM` heading on purpose: both spellings name one reading, so this fixture pins which of the two the overview footer lists first.

## FM

Slugs to `fm`. The same reading as the heading above it, later in the document.

## Links

Slugs to `links`, so the footer spans more than one reading.
